title: Keep Knysna Clean sets 67-bag goal for Mandela Day
description: KNYSNA NEWS - This Mandela Day, the Keep...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - This Mandela Day, the Keep Knysna Clean initiative is calling on residents, local organisations and community groups to spend their 67 minutes taking action for the environment. The mission is to collect 67 bags of litter across Knysna tomorrow, Thursday 18 July.of litter across Knysna tomorrow, Thursday 18 July.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - This Mandela Day, the Keep Knysna Clean initiative is calling on residents, local organisations and community groups to spend their 67 minutes taking action for the environment. The mission is to collect 67 bags of litter across Knysna tomorrow, Thursday 18 July.of litter across Knysna tomorrow, Thursday 18 July."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Keep Knysna Clean is proud to be collaborating with a range of dedicated community groups from across Knysna for a large-scale clean-up effort.","html":"Keep Knysna Clean is proud to be collaborating with a range of dedicated community groups from across Knysna for a large-scale clean-up effort."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Clean-ups will be happening under this banner throughout 18 July at different times in various locations, from estuary and forest clean-ups to the N2 corridor."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Participants are encouraged to bring gloves, sun hats and reusable water bottles. Bags will be provided at key sites, and Knysna Municipality will be assisting with waste collection on the day.","html":"Participants are encouraged to bring gloves, sun hats and reusable water bottles. Bags will be provided at key sites, and Knysna Municipality will be assisting with waste collection on the day."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"If you or your business want to join a group or perhaps lead one in your neighbourhood, contact Tyra on 084 911 5101 or follow Keep Knysna Clean and get in contact through our Facebook and Instagram pages to sign up and find your closest clean-up location.","html":"If you or your business want to join a group or perhaps lead one in your neighbourhood, contact Tyra on 084 911 5101 or follow Keep Knysna Clean and get in contact through our Facebook and Instagram pages to sign up and find your closest clean-up location."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram.","html":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok.","html":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone.","html":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone."}]

images.alt: Keep Knysna Clean sets 67-bag goal for Mandela Day
